name: microui
description: Lightweight native WebView windows for agents — HTTP/SSE content delivery with Photino native frames

binary.description: Pre-built NativeAOT binaries for each platform

commands.win-x64: dotnet publish src/MicroUI/MicroUI.csproj -r win-x64   -c Release /p:PublishAot=true -o bin/win-x64
commands.osx-arm64: dotnet publish src/MicroUI/MicroUI.csproj -r osx-arm64 -c Release /p:PublishAot=true -o bin/osx-arm64
commands.osx-x64: dotnet publish src/MicroUI/MicroUI.csproj -r osx-x64   -c Release /p:PublishAot=true -o bin/osx-x64
commands.linux-x64: dotnet publish src/MicroUI/MicroUI.csproj -r linux-x64 -c Release /p:PublishAot=true -o bin/linux-x64
